title: Rich Tomato Uruguayan Stir-fry
description: This rich and dense Uruguayan dish features a pico de gallo sauce, broiled to perfection with a touch of romance.

ingredients.name: 4 oz gremolata (finely chopped parsley, lemon zest, and lemon juice)

instructions: In a large skillet over medium heat, sauté onions and garlic until soft and translucent. Add the crushed tomatoes, diced tomatoes, and red bell pepper, simmering for about 10 minutes or until slightly thickened.
Blend in half of the feta cheese with the sauce mixture, then stir in gremolata and remaining feta.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and broil until golden brown and bubbly on top (approximately 5-7 minutes).
Serve hot as an accompaniment to any main course.
